title: Early notification of cyber incidents
summary: Initial notification must be submitted to Bank Indonesia no later than 1 hour after the cyber incident is known to the organizer.
deliverables: Notifikasi awal insiden siber kepada Bank Indonesia.
Status awal insiden dan tingkat dampak sementara.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Early cyber incident notification'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Early cyber incident notification'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Initial cyber incident notification' within the time limit according to the regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Cyber ​​incident report
summary: Cyber ​​incident reports must be submitted to Bank Indonesia no later than 3 calendar days after the incident occurs.
deliverables: Laporan insiden siber kepada Bank Indonesia.
Kronologi, dampak, tindakan mitigasi, dan hasil pendalaman awal.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Cyber ​​incident reports'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Cyber ​​incident reports'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Cyber ​​incident report' within the time limit according to regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Annual reporting of KKS maturity level
summary: Annual reporting must contain the KKS maturity level as part of submitting data and information on KKS implementation to Bank Indonesia.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Annual reporting of PSC maturity levels'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Annual reporting of KKS maturity level'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Annual reporting of PSC maturity levels'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Reporting the results of identifying vital information infrastructure
summary: Annual reporting also includes the results of identifying vital information infrastructure that has a broad impact on financial system stability.
owner: Fungsi KKS, TI, dan risk management
deliverables: Dokumen business impact analysis dan prioritas pengendalian.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Reporting of vital information infrastructure identification results'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Reporting of vital information infrastructure identification results'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Reporting of vital information infrastructure identification results'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Indirect supervision and direct supervision
summary: Bank Indonesia carries out indirect supervision through reports/data/information and direct supervision through face-to-face meetings or other mechanisms.
deliverables: Dokumen, data, dan bukti implementasi KKS yang siap ditelusuri.
Tindak lanjut atas hasil pengawasan regulator.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Indirect supervision and direct supervision'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical control (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Indirect supervision and direct supervision'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Indirect supervision and direct supervision'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Consequences of non-compliance reporting
summary: Non-compliance with reporting obligations may result in administrative sanctions in the form of a warning, obligation to pay, termination of activities, and even revocation of permits or approvals.
deliverables: Kontrol internal untuk memastikan pelaporan tepat waktu.
Pemantauan kepatuhan terhadap tenggat laporan regulator.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Consequences of reporting non-compliance'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Reporting non-compliance consequences'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Consequences of reporting non-compliance'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Exchange of vulnerability, threat and incident information
summary: Organizers exchange information regarding the results of identifying cyber vulnerabilities, cyber threats, cyber attacks and cyber incidents that could disrupt the stability of the financial system.
owner: Fungsi keamanan siber dan risk management
deliverables: Informasi sumber dan pola ancaman atau serangan siber.
Pembelajaran penanganan insiden yang dapat dibagikan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Monitor risk exposure from 'Vulnerability, threat and incident information exchange' via executive dashboard. Make sure it is aligned with the company's risk appetite.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Vulnerability, threat and incident information exchange'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Exchange of vulnerability, threat and incident information' within the time limit according to regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Coordination of incident prevention and handling readiness
summary: Bank Indonesia can collaborate and coordinate with authorities, institutions and organizers to prevent cyber incidents and ensure readiness to handle them.
owner: Manajemen KKS dan tim tanggap insiden
deliverables: Partisipasi dalam koordinasi atau simulasi lintas otoritas.
Mekanisme eskalasi eksternal untuk insiden berdampak luas.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Coordination of incident prevention and response readiness'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Coordination of incident prevention and response readiness'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Coordination of incident prevention and handling readiness' within the time limit according to the regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Technical procedures through SRO and implementation based on classification
summary: The SRO can develop technical and specific KKS procedures with approval from Bank Indonesia, while the implementation of the KKS continues to follow the organizer's classification.
timeline: Sesuai kebutuhan teknis dan klasifikasi entitas

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Technical procedures through SROs and implementation by classification'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Technical procedures via SRO and implementation based on classification'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Technical procedures through SRO and implementation by classification'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
